} else { return Promise.reject(err); } }); } /** * @param {{file: string, content(): Promise<string>, extension: string}[]} changes */ async function parseChanges(changes) { return Promise.all(changes.map(async (change)=>({ content: await change.content(), extension: change.extension })));
